title: JVL Arianna Oval Tapered Willow Storage Basket, Grey Wash
features: A must have accessory for every household, our Arianna willow baskets are woven into shape and come in three versatile sizes
The antique washed, neutral tone allows it to work well with most interior, both traditional and modern styles
Strong and durable storage to help clear clutter and organise the home with style, store things away such as jewellery, small clothing, accessories and more
Our basket features a natural-coloured lining with grey trim and bow, the liner can be removed and machine washed at 30 degrees C
Size H:27 x W:50 x D:36cm approx. Capacity:77l approx.
description: This beautiful set of four willow laundry baskets and bins are perfect for using around the home. They are handmade and woven from willow, giving a traditional feel while the antique wash colour allows it to sit in any modern space, meaning its suitable for most interior styles Willow is rapidly renewable; renewable materials come from living sources and regrow as quick as they’re used. Our artisans use these raw fibres to handcraft our woven baskets. The neutral tones and strength make it ideal for basket-weaving and complement the home decor.
